final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing full-screen mobile advertisement screenshot for a flagship smartphone launch campaign.

Style/medium: needs a high-impact brand-reveal aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen vertical layout optimized for mobile display, brand visual centered
Subject: must include a flagship smartphone as hero product, brand identity as focal element
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, immersive backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a high visual-impact, cinematic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, premium brand-reveal direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a premium surface treatment — exact material finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO Find X9" (product name, prominent), "OPPO" (brand wordmark)
Constraints: must preserve 1080×1920 portrait aspect ratio; must read as a brand-exposure launch ad screenshot
Avoid:

error: {"source":"provider","message":"Your resource has been temporarily blocked because we detected behavior that may violate our content policy.
